case_title: MY N NGUYEN VS. JAMES J NGUYEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING APPLICATION FOR SPECIAL APPOINTMENT OF PROCESS SERVER (SERVE DOCUMENTS BY USPS INTERNATIONAL MAIL IN VIETNAM) [COPY IN D.206 OUTBOX]
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-10-2016 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MY NGUYEN IS GRANTED. MR. FRANKLIN IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND PROVIDE IT TO THE COURT BY E-MAIL. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.
ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MY N NGUYEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-26-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-11-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-26-2016 CONTINUED TO OCT-25-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-25-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-24-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-25-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-24-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); FAILURE TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MY N NGUYEN, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-25-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-11-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-25-2017 CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE JULY 25, 2017 HEARING THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THE CASE*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-03-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-24-2016 CONTINUED TO JUL-26-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-24-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MY N NGUYEN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-25-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-24-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-25-2017 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-03-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Franklin of Franklin Law Group telephone number 415-956-2328 for Plaintiff My Nguyen.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Attorney Mark Franklin's MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF MY NGUYEN is granted. Mr. Franklin is to prepare a form of order and provide it to the Court by e-mail.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
